text.title: Global Accessibility Regulation Matrix 2026
text.summary: Jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction table of accessibility regulations in force or coming into effect through 2026, with WCAG standard mappings and enforcement bodies.

rule.statement: US government entities must comply with ADA Title II at WCAG 2.1 AA by April 24, 2026 (large entities, 50K+ population) or April 24, 2027 (smaller entities).
rule.rationale: DOJ final rule published March 2024. Non-compliance exposes state/local agencies to DOJ investigation, private lawsuits, and loss of federal funding.

example.code: Regulation | Scope | Deadline | Standard | Enforcement ADA Title II (DOJ) | State/local government | Apr 2026 (large) | WCAG 2.1 AA | DOJ + lawsuits ADA Title III | Private businesses (courts) | Ongoing | WCAG 2.0/2.1 AA | Private lawsuits Section 508 | Federal agencies | Now | WCAG 2.0 AA | Agency oversight CVAA | Video, communications | Now | WCAG 2.0 AA | FCC

section.title: European Union

rule.statement: EAA requires WCAG 2.1 AA (via EN 301 549) for new e-commerce, banking, transport, and e-book products from June 28, 2025; existing products have until June 28, 2030.
rule.rationale: EU member states set their own enforcement; fines up to 4% of annual revenue. Web Accessibility Directive already applies to all public-sector websites.

example.code: Regulation | Scope | Deadline | Standard EAA | E-commerce, banking, transport, e-books | Jun 2025 (new) | EN 301 549 (~WCAG 2.1 AA) | | Jun 2030 (existing) | Web Accessibility Directive | Public-sector websites and apps | Now | EN 301 549

section.p: EAA explicitly covers: e-commerce websites, banking services (ATMs, web, mobile), electronic communications, transport (ticketing, apps), e-books, and consumer-facing services.

example.code: Jurisdiction | Regulation | Standard | Status Canada (ON) | AODA | WCAG 2.0 AA | Now Canada (Fed) | ACA | WCAG 2.1 AA | Now / 2025 UK | Equality Act 2010 | WCAG 2.1 AA* | Now (*recommended) UK (public) | Public Sector Bodies Regs | WCAG 2.1 AA | Now Australia | Disability Discrimination Act | WCAG 2.1 AA | Now (recommended) Japan | JIS X 8341-3 | WCAG 2.0 based | Now Israel | IS 5568 | WCAG 2.0 AA | Now Brazil | e-MAG | WCAG 2.0 based | Now India | GIGW | WCAG 2.0+ | Government sites
